meaning: 国际权威发行量认证机构
examples: A human study has found strong links between BPA levels and semen quality, and the findings are not looking good.
Levels of BPA vary over time.
Both types of tissue were also able to metabolize BPA.
Activist researchers claim BPA causes obesity because it can be used in fast food packaging.
Now as the BPA controversy has emerged, the sustainability spotlight is suddenly on Eden.
